label: Municipality registration
whyItMatters: This often unlocks the next admin steps.

label: Bank onboarding and identity verification
whyItMatters: Some account options can require extra checks or appointment slots.
note: Requirements differ by provider and account type.

label: GP registration in your area
whyItMatters: Practices can have waiting lists, especially in busy areas.
note: Contact providers early to understand local availability.

label: School-related follow-up
whyItMatters: Family arrivals often need additional timing coordination.
note: Lead times differ by school and municipality.

label: Housing viewings or long-term rental follow-up
whyItMatters: If housing is temporary, viewing schedules can affect your next admin steps.
note: Availability can change quickly in popular cities.

label: Relocation service coordination
whyItMatters: Shared timelines across providers are easier to manage with set checkpoints.
note: Ask for clear ownership of each follow-up action.
